final:
// // When reset is active, the output q is cleared; when parallel load is asserted, the input data d is loaded into q; otherwise, the shift register shifts right.
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input pl,
  input [3:0] d,
  output reg [3:0] q
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
      q <= 4'b0;
    end else if (pl) begin
      q <= d;
    end else begin
      q <= {q[2:0], q[3]};
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When reset is active, the output q is cleared; when parallel load is asserted, the input data d is loaded into q; otherwise, the shift register shifts right.
